title: A bank balance that climbs while you sleep
subtitle: A short visualisation for the feel of money coming in without your direct effort
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation. The scene: waking up, opening the banking app before getting out of bed, and finding the balance higher than when you went to bed. The point is to build the felt sense of income that arrives on its own.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation for the felt sense of effortless income.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation. The scene is a morning: waking up and opening the banking app before getting out of bed, and finding the balance has gone up overnight. Sit somewhere quiet, read each instruction below, and picture it before moving on.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take a slow breath in and let it go.
Picture the morning. Early. Your bedroom is quiet. You wake up before the alarm.
Before you get up, you open the banking app on your phone. The balance is higher than it was when you went to bed last night. You were asleep. You didn't do anything. Something moved.
The increase can be any amount that feels real and significant to you. A product sale, a subscription renewal, an automated income of some kind.
Now picture this happening on three mornings in a row. Different amounts. Different sources. All while you were asleep.
Let the picture be ordinary rather than dramatic. Not a lottery win: a working system. Stay with it for a minute. Then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. A creative visualisation for building the felt sense of effortless income.
